name: Send contracts automatically when CRM deals close

parameters.content:
## Send contracts automatically when CRM deals close

This workflow sends a contract for e-signature via [VisiSign](https://visisign.app) when a deal is marked closed-won in your CRM, then updates the deal status once all parties have signed.

**Who is this for?**
Sales teams and ops teams who want to eliminate manual contract sending after a deal closes.

**How it works**
1. Your CRM sends a webhook when a deal closes
2. VisiSign sends the contract to the contact for signing
3. When all signers complete, a webhook fires
4. The workflow updates your CRM deal status and notifies your team

**Requirements**
- [VisiSign account](https://app.visisign.app/signup) with an API key
- A CRM that supports outgoing webhooks (HubSpot, Pipedrive, Salesforce, etc.)
- The `n8n-nodes-visisign` community node installed (self-hosted n8n only)

**How to set up**
1. Install the community node: Settings → Community Nodes → `n8n-nodes-visisign`
2. Add your VisiSign API key as credentials
3. Configure your CRM to POST to the webhook URL when deals close
4. Update the "Update CRM Deal" node with your CRM's API endpoint
5. Activate the workflow

### 1. Trigger
CRM sends a webhook when a deal is closed-won.

Configure your CRM to POST deal data including:
- `contact_name`
- `contact_email`
- `deal_name`
- `contract_url` (link to your PDF)

### 2. Send contract
VisiSign creates a signature request with the contact's name, email, and the contract PDF.

### 3. Wait for completion
VisiSign Trigger fires when all signers have completed. The workflow then updates your CRM and notifies the team.

parameters.title: ={{ 'Contract — ' + $json.deal_name }}

parameters.subject: ={{ 'Contract signed: ' + $('Contract Completed Trigger').item.json.signature_request.title }}
parameters.message: ={{ $('Contract Completed Trigger').item.json.signature_request.title + ' has been fully signed by all parties.' }}
